Author: Shiro
Name: SkinTattoo
Punchline: Real-time skin decal compositor for FFXIV
Description: Composites image decals onto character skin textures (diffuse + normal) in real time via Penumbra. No game file modification. Supports per-layer emissive, iris glow, ColorTable PBR, and Mod (.pmp) export. Under active development - feedback welcome via Issues or Discord. Type /skintattoo to open.
